sample_text.ph_0: Project: Understanding Investor Behaviors and Motivations
sample_text.ph_44:
Contribution:
The research process was conducted in four stages: Internal meetings with relevant stakeholders, qualitative research to explore and understand investment dynamics in the Kingdom of Saud
sample_text.ph_45:
Impact:
Segmenting the target audience into five main groups based on their investment behaviors.
sample_text.ph_46:
Challenge:
Studying investor behaviors in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia to identify the most effective ways to engage and communicate with them.
